name: Autodesk Construction Cloud (Build) API
what_it_does: Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC) / Build REST API for construction document management, field operations, issue tracking, RFI management, and project collaboration via Autodesk Platform Services (APS). Enables AI agents to manage document and drawing distribution for automated construction document control workflow, handle issue and observation tracking for field deficiency management automation, access RFI creation and routing for construction communication workflow automation, retrieve submittal log management for shop drawing approval workflow, manage project meeting and action item tracking for construction communication automation, handle daily report and field log management for automated project documentation, access cost tracking and change order management for budget control automation, retrieve BIM model coordination and clash detection data for design coordination workflow, manage forms and checklists for quality control and safety inspection automation, and integrate Autodesk Build with Procore, Primavera P6, Viewpoint, and financial ERP systems via Autodesk Platform Services.
use_cases: Managing construction documents from document control agents
Tracking field issues from quality assurance agents
Processing RFIs from construction communication agents
Reporting daily progress from field operations agents
not_for: Construction accounting and job costing (use Viewpoint or Foundation)
Structural and MEP BIM authoring (use Revit directly)
Owner asset management post-construction (use Autodesk Tandem)
best_when: A general contractor, specialty contractor, or owner's representative wanting AI agents to automate document control, field issue tracking, RFI management, submittal workflow, and construction progress reporting within Autodesk Construction Cloud with BIM model integration.
avoid_when: BIM 360 VS ACC API MIGRATION REQUIREMENT: Many projects still use Autodesk BIM 360 (legacy); BIM 360 API and ACC/Build API have different endpoint structures under Autodesk Platform Services (APS); automated integrations built for BIM 360 require migration to ACC API for new projects; verify project platform before API integration design. APS OAUTH SCOPE GRANULARITY FOR AGENT SERVICE ACCOUNTS: Autodesk Platform Services OAuth requires specific ACC/Build Data Management scopes; automated agent service accounts must be granted app-level access by project administrator; APS three-legged OAuth (user consent) required for some endpoints limits pure automation. SAFETY INCIDENT REPORTING IN ISSUES: Automated issue and observation creation in ACC/Build that captures safety incidents must route to safety manager for OSHA evaluation; automated issue closure without safety review creates OSHA recordable misclassification. RFI RESPONSE DESIGN PROFESSIONAL REVIEW: Automated RFI response issuance from ACC/Build must route through licensed architect or engineer of record before field distribution; automated RFI response without design professional review creates professional liability exposure.

auth.notes: Autodesk Construction Cloud uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes via Autodesk Platform Services (APS, formerly Forge). REST API with JSON. San Rafael, California HQ (Autodesk Inc., NASDAQ: ADSK). Autodesk $5B+ annual revenue. Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC) launched 2020, consolidating BIM 360, PlanGrid (acquired 2018, $875M), and BuildingConnected (acquired 2018, $275M). ACC/Build is the unified field management platform. 7,000+ construction firms on ACC. Competes with Procore and Oracle Aconex for construction project management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription with project capacity
pricing.paid_tiers: ACC Build annual subscription per user and project capacity; bundled Autodesk construction portfolio pricing
pricing.notes: San Rafael CA. Autodesk NASDAQ:ADSK. $5B+ revenue. ACC launched 2020. PlanGrid acquired 2018 ($875M). 7,000+ construction firms. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: APS rate limiting per application; data management and issues API calls throttled; webhooks for event-driven architecture

known_agent_gotchas: BIM 360 VS ACC API MIGRATION — VERIFY PROJECT PLATFORM: Autodesk has two API generations — BIM 360 (legacy) and ACC/Autodesk Build (current); BIM 360 and ACC APIs have different endpoint structures under APS; verify whether a specific project is on BIM 360 or ACC before building automated integration; new projects should use ACC API only

THREE-LEGGED OAUTH REQUIRED FOR SOME ACC ENDPOINTS: Certain ACC data management endpoints require three-legged OAuth (user consent flow) rather than two-legged client credentials; automated service account flows may be blocked from user-context-required endpoints; verify OAuth flow type for each required endpoint in automation design

APS RATE LIMITING REQUIRES EXPONENTIAL BACKOFF: Autodesk Platform Services rate limits construction API calls per application and per user; automated bulk document retrieval or issue sync triggers 429 responses; implement exponential backoff with jitter; use webhook-based event architecture to minimize polling

RFI RESPONSE LICENSED PROFESSIONAL REVIEW: Automated RFI response routing via ACC/Build must not auto-issue responses on behalf of architect or engineer; automated RFI response forwarding without licensed professional review creates professional liability and construction defect exposure

ACC Hub and Project permission hierarchy — ACC organizes projects within Hubs (account-level containers); automated agent service account requires both Hub membership and Project-level permissions; project admin must grant per-project access to service account for each project to be automated

BIM model link and version references in issues — ACC issues and RFIs linked to BIM model elements reference specific model version GUIDs; automated issue queries that don't filter by current model version may return issues linked to superseded model versions; implement model version resolution in issue-to-BIM linking automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction project management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/APS. US/EU/AU/UK. Document, BIM model, and field operations data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction cloud. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/APS. US/EU/AU/UK. Construction document and BIM data.
